hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

mkdir -p ~/.claude/skills/saas-platform-setup/session-log && cat >> ~/.claude/skills/saas-platform-setup/session-log/$(date +\%Y-\%m-\%d).md << 'LOGEOF'

## Session End — $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
- Agent: $(echo $CLAUDE_AGENT_ID | cut -c1-8)
- Duration: $(echo $CLAUDE_SESSION_DURATION | cut -d. -f1)s
- Status: Complete

LOGEOF
